visual_description: The scene is set in a dimly lit, green-hued room with wooden walls. A man with short, graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, looks intently at another man whose face is mostly in shadow. The man in the suit maintains a serious expression, suggesting a tense or confrontational interaction.
